title: Full Decode
story: [Meridian-7 Log #021] rEx's response has arrived. The first batch of data is strange — some words are immediately followed by numbers, like some kind of tagging system. rEx says you need to "look ahead" to understand: extract all words that are immediately followed by a number. This is an advanced feature of rEx's language.
promptChallenge: Write a prompt to have AI generate a regex that matches words immediately followed by a number (without including the number itself)
hints: [Hint] You need to match lines containing a "letter immediately followed by digit" pattern
[Hint] Lookahead (?=...) can check what follows without consuming it
[Hint] Or simply match letter+digit combinations directly
promptHints: Tell the AI the target is strings containing letters immediately followed by digits
Hint the AI to use lookahead assertions
A single precise instruction is more effective than a lengthy description

feedback.onPass: [Pattern Accepted] Lookahead parsing successful. You're beginning to "see" the structure behind the signal.
feedback.onFail: [Parse Failed] Lookahead failed. "Look but don't take" — this requires a new way of thinking.
feedback.onPerfect: [Decryption Success] Perfect lookahead. You're not just matching — you're anticipating.
feedback.onDirectWrite: [Manual Override] Manual lookahead. Assertions are just tools to you.
